title: Theoretical Physics Knowledge Network
purpose: Bridge a standalone structured semi-formal theory knowledge network into AITP as an explicit downstream Layer 2 backend rather than a hidden side channel.

Serve as the machine-primary typed companion of `backend:theoretical-physics-brain` when a clone treats `obsidian-markdown/01 Theoretical Physics` as the operator-facing realization of the same downstream knowledge network.

Preserve theorem-grade statements, derivation spines, source-fusion boundaries, and translation readiness so later Lean export is possible without pretending that every promoted unit is already a proof artifact.
artifact_granularity: One promoted typed unit together with its source manifest update and any required edge or index rebuild is the atomic structured backend artifact.
retrieval_hints: Read indexes/unit_index.jsonl, indexes/source_anchor_index.jsonl, and edges/edges.jsonl before any writeback.
Treat the standalone repository as a typed external Layer 2 backend, not as chat memory or a folder dump.
Human-reviewed promotion remains available for L2.
Theory-formal candidates may enter L2_auto only after passing coverage, regression, and multi-agent consensus gates.

When the paired `backend:theoretical-physics-brain` backend is active, keep semantic identity, source anchors, assumptions, regime limits, and unresolved-gap boundaries aligned across the typed and human-readable surfaces.

Treat this backend as machine-primary for graph traversal, structured retrieval, relation checks, and deterministic rebuilding; that role does not make it globally more authoritative than the paired human-readable backend.
Lean export is a later bridge from selected bounded families rather than the sole meaning of success.
notes: This card documents the public bridge from AITP into the standalone Theoretical-Physics-Knowledge-Network repository, including the theory-specific L2_auto path. Under the paired-backend pattern, the typed repository and the Obsidian theoretical-physics brain are governed paired realizations of the same semi-formal theory knowledge network. The typed repository is machine-primary, the brain is operator-primary, and neither backend gains silent authority from format alone. See `canonical/backends/THEORETICAL_PHYSICS_PAIRED_BACKEND_CONTRACT.md`.
